summary: Made Write note detail show promotion status for Today Focus, Home tasks, and Home protocol drafts/templates, with duplicate states visible, Home task route-to-destination support, focused status lookup tests, and docs updated to reflect the domain-tested UI contract.

contract_status_changes.before: Future UI affordance after destination promotion paths existed
contract_status_changes.after: Implemented with domain-tested status-source proof for Today, Home task, and Home protocol destinations

contract_status_changes.before: Destination route-back to Write existed where implemented; Write detail did not expose destination state or routing
contract_status_changes.after: Write detail can route to promoted Home tasks through the existing Home task highlight path; Today Focus and protocol-template destinations are status-only until explicit destination highlighting exists

residual_risks: No running-app smoke, flow verification, screenshot proof, real-device proof, or TestFlight proof was performed for the new Write Move section.
Today Focus and Home protocol-template destination routes remain status-only because those destinations do not yet have explicit highlight routes comparable to Home tasks.
Permanent-note promotion remains contract-only and was not implemented in this slice.
recommended_next_reason: The next useful proof infrastructure slice remains owlory-running-app-smoke, but it is not yet queued as a ready slice in this handoff.
